summary: Implemented the NiceGUI-served operator console entry point in scripts/web_app_hub.py, moved preserved JSON/health/live contracts onto FastAPI routes, kept the legacy HTTP handler behind --legacy-http for diagnostic comparison, verified root rendering consumes /api/live with fallback polling and selected-round preservation markers, added focused fixture coverage, updated completed OpenSpec checkboxes for the owned slice, committed, and pushed the branch.
tasks_completed: 1.1 Inventory current web app public HTTP, JSON, health, live update, deployment, and test contracts.
1.2 Add NiceGUI runtime dependency and default NiceGUI application entry point.
1.3 Keep browser-facing data adapters independently testable from rendered UI code.
1.4 Build NiceGUI-served overview with readiness, live freshness, round context, and drill-ins.
1.5 Build rounds and round detail views with branch evidence, validation, final review, timeline, agents, blockers, and decision flow.
1.6 Build inbox, runtime, and troubleshooting detail surfaces for source errors, raw payloads, validation, diagnostics, cursor, and fallback evidence.
1.7 Preserve read-only behavior for page load, live updates, reconnect, fallback polling, diagnostics, health checks, and smoke tests.
1.8 Preserve JSON, health, snapshot, round detail, round events, and live update contracts.
1.10 Add focused no-spend tests for NiceGUI serving markers and browser contract preservation.
1.11 Run static, fixture, OpenSpec, and local HTTP smoke checks.
